falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern assumed contained volatility; sustained fear invalidates the stabilization thesis and suggests a deeper liquidation phase than the historical analog
A 70bp flight-to-safety rally in bonds would signal recession/depression pricing, breaking the soft-landing assumption embedded in the 78% pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 (8% below current levels)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would violate the August 2024 low structure entirely, proving the 78% similarity was a false analog and the market is in a different regime (crash vs. bottom)

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
